title: First-login password change and Users admin cleanup (dbg122)
description:
Users who must change their password on first login can set a new password without entering the temporary default password. The login flow, account settings, and PipeSync settings modal hide the current-password field and the API accepts new-password-only when mustChangePassword is active.

PipeSync also drops the legacy inline Users Settings modal (dbg122); user admin stays in the modular psr-admin flow. Desktop CSS adds shared pill-button theme tokens for consistent orange-accent controls.

Who is affected: OVH private server on deploy. SaaS when Mike applies the platform version in releases.html.
changeLog: Backend: POST /change-password skips current password check when mustChangePassword is true.
Login and account settings: omit current password field and payload on forced password change.
PipeSync: legacy Users Settings modal removed from app.js (dbg122).
Desktop CSS: hp-btn pill theme custom properties for toolbar and modal buttons.
